subgoals.description: Search for and compile a list of potential venues in Edinburgh with basic details
subgoals.success_criterion: List of venues with names, locations, and key features is available

subgoals.description: Retrieve detailed information for the top venue from the compiled list
subgoals.success_criterion: Detailed venue information including address, capacity, amenities, and pricing is obtained

subgoals.description: Draft a promotional flyer using the gathered venue details
subgoals.success_criterion: Flyer is completed with all necessary information and formatted appropriately
